{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201257A4DA53FDD8CB31C489F7"}"},"total":200},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7534881574040257342","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"良草，虽然有些地方写的有点小白，但是精彩的点也有不少，尤其是大公换御主后的那个令咒，让大公在最后完美表现出穿刺公之名才落幕，而不是跟原著那样悲惨落幕"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1754357520,"group_id":"7476705731828255769","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NyK5jbkNPDZwOY8GrSVDzU0XDKMewtcjtdvxi0+wNyzL","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/97aaf081816d4b33b67f68260a7bd47d~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704622&x-signature=snALHnerxLbvVxkW7pbdmZ8wT9c%3D","user_id":"2518295483790656","user_name":"LDFTG"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2518295483790656","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7476705731828255769","book_info":{"abstract":"【男主前期基本神隐，只会在大后期出现】
【无女主】+【弥补遗憾】+【综漫指的是，许多动漫世界】
【综漫1—漆黑的子弹—综漫2—恶魔人：哭泣之子—东京喰种—综漫3—终末的女武神—黑兽—绝望世界1—地错1—剑风传奇（进行中）】
林岳死了，他变成了本源圣杯，拥有了一切可能。
为了能更快成长于是他打算在万界搞事情。
在综漫日常掀起圣杯战争，改变无数主角和配角命运。
在绝望的世界（弹丸论破，漆黑子弹等）散播希望，让英灵拯救绝望的世界。
给满是污秽的里世界一点英灵的光辉震撼。
将其他动漫世界的主角和配角变成英灵，互相碰撞。
诸多世界在林岳的干预下改变了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o40d628e55e7ada18d9d30b14729f16a9~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"无忧之路","author_id":"","book_id":"7476705731828255769","book_name":"综漫，来点小小的英灵震撼","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#382030","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2.3万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":718,"name":"动漫衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=718&name=动漫衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":71,"name":"诸天万界","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=71&name=诸天万界&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":391,"name":"无女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=391&name=无女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":465,"name":"综漫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=465&name=综漫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7476705759909118489","read_count":"22449","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1783876"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.4","serial_count":"812","tags":"动漫衍生,穿越,诸天万界,无女主,综漫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/287671769fef8daf8f996149f4a11842~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779365577&x-signature=wfmtupvIS0W7ZGXoSysofsn3L3Q%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1261849831025444","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"433"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322201257A4DA53FDD8CB31C489F7"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读8小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":21,
